title: Klaviyo vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
h1: Klaviyo vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Comparison
intro: Klaviyo and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Klaviyo focuses on e-commerce brands with advanced automation and integrations, while Campaign Monitor caters to agencies and teams managing multiple clients. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right tool for your marketing needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Freemium (free up to 500 contacts, paid from $45/month)
E-commerce brands on Shopify and WooCommerce
comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies and teams managing multiple brands

comparison_table.tool_a: Predictive analytics, SMS, e-commerce integrations, product reviews
comparison_table.tool_b: Multi-brand management, journey designer, template builder, transactional email

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce business on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced product integrations
You want a free tier to test email marketing without upfront investment
You need SMS marketing and predictive analytics alongside email campaigns
choose_b_if: You're an agency managing email campaigns for multiple clients and brands
You want the lowest entry price with no free tier commitment
You prioritize multi-brand management and transactional email capabilities

faq.q: Is Klaviyo better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce brands with superior integrations, automation, and ratings (4.6 vs 4.1 on G2). Campaign Monitor is better for agencies managing multiple client accounts. Choose based on whether you need deep e-commerce functionality or multi-brand management.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor has a lower entry price at $11/month and no free tier requirement. However, Klaviyo offers a free plan for up to 500 subscribers, making it cost-free to start. For most growing businesses, both are competitively priced once you move beyond the free tier.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, switching is straightforward. Both platforms support contact list imports and email template migration. Most users can transition their subscriber lists and campaign data within hours. We recommend exporting your contacts and templates from Campaign Monitor before importing them into Klaviyo.
